anchor:
Senior Data Scientist – PyTorch & LLM Engineer  
Location: United States (Remote‑flexible, on‑site at Boston or Seattle hub)  
Employment: Full‑time, Open‑engagement salary $180K–210K, plus equity options  
Seniority: 8+ years in AI/ML, 5+ years as a technical leader or Senior ML Engineer  
Core Skills: Python (≥3.10), PyTorch, Hugging Face transformers, large‑language models, advanced Pandas workflows, CUDA, distributed training, MLOps (Kubeflow, MLflow)  
Required Experience: Proven delivery of production‑grade transformer models (GPT‑ or LLaMA‑style), end‑to‑end data pipelines, model lifecycle management, and cross‑functional team leadership; familiarity with AWS Sagemaker / Azure ML / GCP AI Platform; strong software engineering practices (Git, CI/CD, packaging).  
Domain Expertise: Minimum 3+ years in regulated or mission‑critical industries (FinTech, Healthcare, Defense) or high‑growth startup AI; security clearance (Secret) is a plus.  
Academic & Professional Credentials: PhD or Master’s in Computer Science, ML or related field preferred; 10+ publications or patents in NLP/Deep Learning is a strong advantage.  
Additional Requirements: Excellent written and spoken English, adept at translating complex ML concepts for non‑technical stakeholders, experience mentoring junior data scientists, and a passion for responsible AI practices.  
Start Date: Immediate or within 4–6 weeks.

positive.summary: Senior Data Scientist with 9+ years of experience building large‑language models for regulated sectors, leading ML teams and deploying production‑grade transformer pipelines.

work_experience.description: Designed and implemented scalable NLP models for clinical note analysis, delivering production GPT‑based summarization services under HIPAA compliance. Championed model lifecycle management, responsible AI audits, and cross‑functional stakeholder training.

Architect and lead deployment of GPT‑style transformer for fraud detection, overseeing end‑to‑end data pipelines, model training, and MLOps stack using Kubeflow, MLflow, and AWS SageMaker. Managed a team of 6 data scientists and 3 ML engineers.

anchor:
- Full‑Stack Engineer, MERN + GraphQL focus  
- 3–5 years’ professional experience (senior or lead preferred)

- English fluency; Spanish a plus
